name: Skedda Space and Resource Scheduling API
what_it_does: Space and resource scheduling platform with REST API — enabling organizations to manage booking of meeting rooms, desks, parking spaces, sports facilities, and other shared resources, with self-service booking, visual floor maps, access control integrations, and API access for programmatic booking management and integrations with workplace management systems.
use_cases: Managing desk booking via Skedda API for hybrid work hot-desking automation
Room booking integration via Skedda API for calendar and workplace management systems
Automating space reservation via Skedda for event and facility management workflows
Retrieving space utilization data via Skedda API for workplace analytics
Building single sign-on for Skedda via API for enterprise identity management
not_for: Appointment scheduling with service providers (use Calendly or Acuity for service bookings)
Complex field service management (use ServiceMax or Salesforce Field Service)
best_when: An organization managing shared physical spaces (office desks, meeting rooms, sports courts, co-working spaces) needs a visual, self-service booking system with API access for integration.
avoid_when: You need service appointment scheduling, equipment tracking, or complex field service workflows.

auth.notes: API key via Authorization: Bearer header. API key from Skedda account settings. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for booking events (create/update/cancel). REST API available on Business and Enterprise plans. SAML SSO on Enterprise plan.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 5 spaces, basic features
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential $99/month (unlimited spaces, single venue); Pro $149/month; Business $199/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Australian company (Melbourne). Founded 2012. Raised limited funding (primarily bootstrapped). Used by: universities, co-working spaces, sports clubs, hospitals, corporations. 5,000+ organizations. Customers: Cambridge University, Panasonic, Singapore Airlines. Visual floor plan for desk/room selection. Self-service booking with rules (advance booking, max duration). Mobile apps. Integrations: Google Calendar, Outlook, Slack, Microsoft Teams, LDAP. Multi-venue support. Sports facility booking popular (tennis courts, squash courts). Workplace pivot post-COVID (hybrid desk booking).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with Bearer token. Webhooks. GDPR. Australian company. Free plan for small deployments. API requires Business+ plan. Limited public API documentation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Space reads idempotent by space ID. Booking reads idempotent. Booking creation: check for conflicts before creating (space may be double-booked). Cancellation idempotent by booking ID.
known_agent_gotchas: API requires Business plan or higher — not available on free or Essential plan
Booking creation must check for time conflicts — API may not prevent double-booking automatically
Space ID required for booking — list spaces first to get IDs
Timezone handling important — all bookings in venue's configured timezone
Australian company — GDPR compliant for EU use; AU data residency by default
Webhook events cover booking lifecycle — use for real-time integration vs polling

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Australian company. Bearer token auth. No OAuth2 scope granularity. Booking data (office/facility usage patterns) is operationally sensitive. AU/US/EU data residency options. SAML SSO on enterprise plan.
